title: 12 Placing Foreign Currency Orders â FX Notes
body_text:
12	Placing Foreign Currency Orders â FX Notes
12.1	Overview of Placing Foreign Currency Order â FX Notes
Central 1 has arrangements with a third-party service provider, Globex 2000, to offer FX Notes to financial institutions. The FX Notes application is used to buy and sell foreign currency.
Financial institutions can access the FX Notes application via the Client Centre. See the FX Notes Part for more information.
Important:
Any contaminated, mutilated, unfit and/or out of circulation foreign currency (not including US currency) must not be accepted. Foreign currency bank notes with a value of $0.50 CAD or less and foreign currency coins must also not be accepted.
END
